title: Vocational School of Health Services
content:
Vocational School of Health Services

Electroneurophysiology

MENU

The aim of this program is to train electroneurophysiology technicians that are be able to use electroneurophysiology methods under the supervision of doctors in the diagnosis of mental problems occurring in the cognitive and behavioral functions of the brain.

Students who graduate from this department may work in health departments such as neurology, psychiatry, podiatry, physiology and chest diseases as well as electroencephalography and sleep therapy units of hospitals under the supervision of a specialist. Moreover, graduates may also carry out scientific research as an electroneurophysiology technician.

Period of Education

2 years

Prep School:

Optional

Hospital Practice:

Yes

Hospital Internship:

Yes

Education Language:

Turkish
